These S&P 500 stocks are expected to make double-digit comebacks
Nasdaq 100, Dow Jones 30 and S&P 500 Forecasts – US Indices Looking to Continue Recovery
Wall Street is coalescing on a single S&P 500 target. The power of round numbers is irresistible.
Wall Street Is Getting More Bullish on Stocks. The S&P 500 Is 'Earning' Its Gains.

holdings.infoBox: SSO is an equity ETF with a total of 522 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra S&P 500 (SSO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund provides 2x daily leveraged exposure to a market cap-weighted index of 500 large- and mid-cap US companies selected by S&P. SSO was launched on Jun 19, 2006 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: The S&P 500 is at a critical crossroads. A break lower could signal more losses ahead.
data.text: The S&P 500 on Thursday finished right on the cusp of a critical support line that, if broken, could portend more losses for stocks in the coming days and weeks.

data.title: These S&P 500 stocks are expected to make double-digit comebacks
data.text: A list of 20 highly rated stocks favored by analysts for gains over the next year includes only one that has risen this year: Nvidia.

data.title: Nasdaq 100, Dow Jones 30 and S&P 500 Forecasts – US Indices Looking to Continue Recovery
data.text: US indices look to continue to go higher on Thursday, continuing the recovery we saw on Wednesday.

data.title: Wall Street is coalescing on a single S&P 500 target. The power of round numbers is irresistible.
data.text: Wall Street, and Main Street, love their round numbers, as at least four strategists have the same 8,000 year-end target on the S&P 500.

data.title: Wall Street Is Getting More Bullish on Stocks. The S&P 500 Is 'Earning' Its Gains.
data.text: Wall Street firms are getting more bullish on earnings—and stocks—heading into the second half of 2026.

data.title: J.P. Morgan lifts its S&P 500 target to 7,800 but warns that a ‘flash crash' remains a risk
data.text: J.P. Morgan strategists lifted their year-end S&P 500 forecast, saying they had been much too cautious around “unpredented” expectations for earnings growth.

data.title: Your index fund is hiding a looming tech-stock risk — here is how to protect your portfolio
data.text: The S&P 500's top 10 stocks dominate like never before. Here is a better way to invest.

data.title: S&P 500 to 8,200: Where to Invest Before the Next Leg Higher
data.text: Mark Gibbens, Chief Investment Officer, Gibbens Capital Management explains how to position for the next leg higher as powerful earnings and the AI buildout drive markets. Subscribe | http://t.st/TheS...

data.title: The S&P 500 Concentration Problem: When Index Investing Becomes A Bet On 10 Stocks
data.text: Somewhere along the way, the S&P 500 stopped being a diversified portfolio of American business and became a very expensive bet on a handful of technology companies. The numbers are startling: the top...

data.title: Top 3 catalysts for the S&P 500 Index this week
data.text: The S&P 500 Index remained under pressure last week after the Federal Reserve delivered a highly hawkish interest rate decision. It also wavered as investors reacted to the new ceasefire between the U...

data.title: S&P 500 and Dow Jones Forecast: AI Rally Faces Fed and Tariff Risks
data.text: S&P 500 and Dow Jones remain supported by AI strength and easy liquidity, but tariff pressure, sticky inflation, and a hawkish Fed may limit upside in the short term.

data.title: S&P 500 Index: Intel-Apple Chip Deal Sparks Broad Tech Stock Rally
data.text: Intel surged after Apple chose it for U.S. chip production, lifting semiconductor stocks and helping Wall Street rebound from a hawkish Fed selloff.

data.title: Warsh experiences worst 'Fed day' S&P 500 performance for a new chair since 1994
data.text: The S&P 500 tumbled more than 1% in Wednesday's session, with losses steepening during Warsh' innagural press conference as chair. That marks the worst performance for the broad index on the first "Fe...

data.title: The Top 10 Stocks Are 40% of the S&P 500  — What To Do About It
data.text: ProShares Global Investment Strategist Simeon Hyman highlights the S&P 500's 40% concentration in its top names and explains why investors are exploring small caps, international stocks, and smarter b...

data.title: S&P500 and Nasdaq 100: US Indices Await Warsh's First Fed Verdict
data.text: US stocks tread water ahead of Kevin Warsh's first Fed decision as investors watch rate policy, the dot plot and support levels in the S&P 500.

data.title: Evercore's Julian Emanuel on his bull case for S&P 500 reaching 9,000
data.text: Julian Emanuel, chief equity and quantitative strategist at Evercore, joins CNBC's 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss what's driving the markets, his bull case for the S&P 500, and more

data.title: Dow Jones and S&P500: Markets Weigh Iran Deal After Record Rally
data.text: The U.S. stock markets are steady as traders monitor Iran deal developments, key U.S. economic data, and whether tech leadership can continue.

data.title: These stocks have been beating the S&P 500 and could keep the bull market going, says Morgan Stanley
data.text: The bull market for stocks has been dogged by peak earnings revisions breadth and peak liquidity, but fear not says Morgan Stanley.

data.title: Nasdaq 100 and S&P500: Forecast Today as Iran Peace Deal Announcement Lifts US Stocks
data.text: US stocks rally as Iran peace deal announcement sends oil prices lower, while traders await the Fed decision and key economic data.

data.title: S&P 500 Outlook: Using Elliott Wave Analysis to Spot Key Market Turning Points
data.text: A multi-day bounce is underway, nearing its end, to be followed by another decline. Elliott Wave analysis accurately anticipated recent moves, forecasting the three-step corrective bounce.

data.title: S&P 500, SPY, VOO, IVV outlook: top news to watch this week
data.text: The S&P 500 Index and its top ETFs, like State Street's SPY, Vanguard's VOO, and BlackRock's IVV jumped for two consecutive days. It jumped to $7,430, up modestly from this month's low of $7,240.

data.title: S&P 500 and Dow Jones Forecast: SPX Eyes 8,000 as Fed and Tariff Risks Rise
data.text: The S&P 500 and Dow Jones remain bullish, but Fed uncertainty, sticky inflation, tariff risks, and AI spending pressures may make the rally more selective.

data.title: S&P500: SpaceX IPO and Iran Deal Set Stage for Market Volatility
data.text: S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 futures rise as Iran peace hopes and SpaceX's record IPO fuel market volatility and reshape investor sentiment.

data.title: The S&P 500 already made a big call on SpaceX stock and index fund investors need to know it
data.text: SpaceX is set to begin trading on the Nasdaq Friday with a valuation of around $1.75 trillion. The S&P 500 index committee decided to not shorten its standard 12-month period before adding newly publi...

data.title: The S&P 500 chart is breaking down — but this new buy signal is flashing green
data.text: A look behind the stock market's key support levels shows bullish NYSE activity and a hidden shift in volatility.
